topics.title: American Idol and Intern Show Discussions
topics.summary: The studio explores the results of an American Idol celebrity guessing pool, debates a colleague's recent haircut and weight loss, and reviews clips from an intern show featuring staff evaluations.

topics.title: Internship Ratings and Evaluations
topics.summary: The studio evaluates various interns and staff members on a scale of one to ten based on their physical appearance, personality, and performance.

topics.title: Staff Interactions and Upcoming Roast Planning
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding staff members, personal appearances, various comedy tracks, and the logistical planning for an upcoming roast event.

topics.title: Upcoming Roast Lineup and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming roast lineup, a recent interview with John Stamos, local sports news, and various celebrity rumors involving Paris Hilton and Lindsay Lohan.

topics.title: Legal Disputes and Listener Feedback
topics.summary: The studio addresses a legal dispute involving Leslie Moonves, reviews listener feedback regarding recent guests John Stamos and John Daly, and responds to various fan comments about the show's content and personnel.

topics.title: Radio Industry Trends and Film Budgets
topics.summary: The studio discusses the evolution of acoustic performances in radio, the high production costs of upcoming superhero films, and local news regarding a controversial DJ.

topics.title: Acoustic Performance and Industry Conflict
topics.summary: The studio features a live acoustic performance of several songs while discussing upcoming tour plans and personal grievances regarding media coverage.

topics.title: Medical Testing and Prank Calls
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where the hosts use a glucose monitor to check for diabetes while discussing prank calls made to public access television.

topics.title: Whack Pack Interactions and Guest Callers
topics.summary: The show features a series of segments including a call with a listener named Eric, the airing of various prank calls and voicemails from members of the Whack Pack, and discussions regarding upcoming guests.

topics.title: Elliot Offen Interview and Heist Claims
topics.summary: The studio features a segment with Elliot Offen, who discusses his criminal history involving a $30 million heist, his upcoming film projects, and various personal anecdotes.

topics.title: Heavy Metal Tour Experiences
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion about the challenges of touring in heavy metal bands, personal relationships, and the differences between being a drummer versus a lead singer.

topics.title: Dee Snider and Motorcycle Charity Ride
topics.summary: The studio hosts Dee Snider as he discusses his motorcycle riding, a charity event for March of Dimes, and personal anecdotes regarding past relationships.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Show Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming show segments, a prank involving Ashton Kutcher, and various celebrity news stories including Eva Longoria and Paula Abdul.

topics.title: Lance Armstrong and Siobhan's Medical Procedures
topics.summary: The studio discusses a story about Lance Armstrong intervening in a robbery, identifies fake news items among several stories, and explores Siobhan's surgical procedures and medical status.

topics.title: Drug Addiction and Sexual Exploration
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding an individual's struggle with heroin and methamphetamine addiction followed by a segment involving sexual exploration and physical interaction.

topics.title: Condoleezza Rice and Host Music Rankings
topics.summary: The studio explores the musical preferences of Condoleezza Rice alongside a list of provocative tracks and humorous commentary on celebrity news.

topics.title: Media News and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The show covers various news segments including the removal of an offensive ringtone, White House press briefings, immigration debates, animal welfare cases, and upcoming television cancellations.

topics.title: The DaVinci Code and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show discusses the confusing nature of The DaVinci Code film, a violent domestic assault in Philadelphia, upcoming appearances by Rosie O'Donnell and Pam Anderson, and various local entertainment events.
